rationale: Both papers are in paid search and use Bayesian modeling on daily 2004 lodging-chain campaign data, so the cited 2011 spillover study could plausibly be a substantive prior context/foundation. However, the citing note’s explicit prior-work linkage highlights Ghose and Yang (2009) rather than this 2011 paper, and the matched evidence is only a DOI-level reference with no citation sentence context. Given this mixed/sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop but not strong enough to clearly keep.
